summary: Multiple packages have noUncheckedIndexedAccess:false — type-safety gap for null slots
@pierre/diffs in dependencies — appears to be a personal npm package, not a widely-known diff library. Risk of supply-chain if maintainer account is compromised or package is unpublished.
@opencode-ai/script listed in BOTH dependencies and devDependencies of packages/opencode/package.json — likely a copy-paste error
electron-builder.config.ts references native/swift-build modules that don't exist on disk (packages/desktop/native/ directory missing)
109 'any' type usages in packages/opencode/src — type-safety erosion, especially 5 in claims.ts, 5 in prompt.ts, 3 in bus/index.ts, and 1 in cache.ts (Deferred<any> bypassing error channel)
